calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-24-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly scheduled calendar for hearing on this day. Present: Commissioner:Loretta M. Norris, Clerk:J.Stokes, Reporter:P.Dowling. All parties present. Plaintiff represented by John P. Zanghi,Esq. and Magoli Echvarria authorized agent for Caritas Management. The case was settled on the record. The trial date was vacated.

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Aug-26-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
